title: carya cordiformis
intro: Carya cordiformis, also known as the Bitternut or Shellbark Hickory, is a deciduous tree species native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carya cordiformis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Carya cordiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
